objective: Add a small GET /ping endpoint to the FastAPI in-memory task-board API. The endpoint must return exactly {"pong": true}. Add pytest coverage and keep all existing tests passing. This task must be submitted through the Web/OpenClaw intake adapter path.
constraints: Do not ask the human for routine engineering decisions.
Use the existing FastAPI app in app/main.py.
Keep the implementation minimal and deterministic.
Do not change existing endpoint semantics.
Do not commit .env, credentials, private keys, .venv, caches, browser profiles, or runtime queue JSON.
Produce strict autonomous result schema and fresh skill resolver evidence.
notes: Submitted through Web/OpenClaw adapter real-goal validation.
